name: opencode-stt
description: Provider-agnostic speech-to-text dictation plugin for the OpenCode TUI.

scripts.smoke: bun --preload @opentui/solid/preload -e 'import plugin from "./voxtral-stt.tsx"; import packaged from "opencode-stt/tui"; if (plugin.id !== "opencode-stt" || packaged.id !== "opencode-stt") throw new Error("bad plugin id"); console.log(plugin.id)'
scripts.ci: bun run typecheck && bun run test && bun run smoke
